title: Nada Untuk Asa
overview: Everything seems perfect in life Nada. He has a dream of domestic life, cute kids, and families who have always supported it. Until one day, a tragedy happened to him. The tragedy that not only claimed her soul mate, but also his family and his future. However, the tragedy and then make notes to dare to live and fight for life. This is the story of the struggle for the sake of continuity tone up and future.
